summary: Add history-cache command that reads rates_snapshots for a pair, with --since (e.g. 30d, 24h, YYYY-MM-DD) and --limit. Pure-SQL parameterized; --limit binds via ? not Sprintf.
reason: Free-tier alternative to the paid /history endpoint. Users who run sync-rates daily build their own historical archive at no extra quota cost. Returns helpful guidance when no snapshots exist for the requested pair.
validated_outcome: history-cache USD EUR --since 30d --limit 5 returns snapshots ordered by captured_at DESC; --limit binding parameterized verified by direct SQL inspection.
